    Subinterfaces of Metamodel.Feature in com.abstratt.simon.metamodel
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    Metamodel.Composition
    A feature that depicts an owned object.
    static interface 
    Metamodel.Reference
    A feature that depicts a reference to another (non-owned) object.
    static interface 
    Metamodel.Slot
    A slot is a feature that can hold a basic value.
